title: Horsens, Central Jutland — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Horsens, Central Jutland: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Horsens is a city in Central Jutland with a population of 59,000. A fjord-side city with a historic prison turned cultural center, known for its European Medieval Festival.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
